page.name: MIXER

pad1.name: `deck 3 mute_stem 'vocal' ? get_text 'INSTRUMENTAL' : deck 3 mute_stem 'melody' ? get_text 'ACAPELLA' : get_text 'ALL STEMS'`
pad1.color: `deck 3 mute_stem 'vocal' ? color 'yellow' : deck 3 mute_stem 'melody' ? color 'green' : color 'blue'`

page.pad1: deck 3 mute_stem 'vocal' ? deck 3 mute_stem 'vocal' : deck 3 mute_stem 'melody' ? deck 3 mute_stem 'melody' & deck 3 mute_stem 'rhythm' & deck 3 mute_stem 'vocal' : deck 3 mute_stem 'melody' & deck 3 mute_stem 'rhythm'

pad2.name: `deck 1 mute_stem 'vocal' ? get_text 'INSTRUMENTAL' : deck 1 mute_stem 'melody' ? get_text 'ACAPELLA' : get_text 'ALL STEMS'`
pad2.color: `deck 1 mute_stem 'vocal' ? color 'yellow' : deck 1 mute_stem 'melody' ? color 'green' : color 'blue'`

page.pad2: deck 1 mute_stem 'vocal' ? deck 1 mute_stem 'vocal' : deck 1 mute_stem 'melody' ? deck 1 mute_stem 'melody' & deck 1 mute_stem 'rhythm' & deck 1 mute_stem 'vocal' : deck 1 mute_stem 'melody' & deck 1 mute_stem 'rhythm'

pad3.name: `deck 2 mute_stem 'vocal' ? get_text 'INSTRUMENTAL' : deck 2 mute_stem 'melody' ? get_text 'ACAPELLA' : get_text 'ALL STEMS'`
pad3.color: `deck 2 mute_stem 'vocal' ? color 'yellow' : deck 2 mute_stem 'melody' ? color 'green' : color 'blue'`

page.pad3: deck 2 mute_stem 'vocal' ? deck 2 mute_stem 'vocal' : deck 2 mute_stem 'melody' ? deck 2 mute_stem 'melody' & deck 2 mute_stem 'rhythm' & deck 2 mute_stem 'vocal' : deck 2 mute_stem 'melody' & deck 2 mute_stem 'rhythm'

pad13.name: 3. PLAY ▶
pad13.query: deck 3 loaded ? (deck 3 play ? blink 1bt : on) : off
